ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug molecule */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the drug */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drug */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Current phase of drug development */,
  "therapeutic_area" TEXT /* Therapeutic area or disease category the drug targets */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Regulatory approval status of the drug */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the drug entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the drug entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the drug entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the drug entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drugs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drugs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "atoms" (
  "atom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each atom */,
  "atom_symbol" TEXT /* Chemical symbol of the atom (e.g., C, H, O) */,
  "atomic_number" INTEGER /* Atomic number of the atom */,
  "atomic_mass" REAL /* Atomic mass of the atom */,
  "valence_electrons" INTEGER /* Number of valence electrons in the atom */,
  "isotope" TEXT /* Common isotopes of the atom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the atom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonds" (
  "bond_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bond */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug molecule the bond belongs to */,
  "atom1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first atom in the bond */,
  "atom2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second atom in the bond */,
  "bond_type" INTEGER /* Type of the bond (e.g., single, double, triple) */,
  "bond_length" REAL /* Length of the bond in picometers */,
  "bond_energy" REAL /* Energy required to break the bond in kJ/mol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bond */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonds_atom1_id FOREIGN KEY ("atom1_id") REFERENCES atoms ("atom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonds_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonds_bond_type FOREIGN KEY ("bond_type") REFERENCES bond_types ("bond_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonds_atom2_id FOREIGN KEY ("atom2_id") REFERENCES atoms ("atom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bond_types" (
  "bond_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bond type */,
  "bond_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bond type (e.g., single, double, triple) */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Relative strength of the bond type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bond type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bond_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug molecule being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the drug molecule */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the drug molecule was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
